name: QET H5 - Nightly Reconciliation + Weekly Edge Report

parameters.query: SELECT id, status, entry_order_id, exit_order_id, entry_fill_price, entry_fill_time FROM public.trade_ledger WHERE mode = 'paper' AND created_at >= now() - interval '3 days'

SELECT strategy, mode, n_trades, win_rate, round(expectancy_r, 3) AS expectancy_r, profit_factor, t_stat, sharpe_annualized, kelly_star, round(avg_entry_slip_bps, 1) AS entry_slip, round(avg_exit_slip_bps, 1) AS exit_slip, round(total_net_pnl, 2) AS net_pnl FROM public.edge_metrics_by_strategy ORDER BY mode, strategy

parameters.content:
## QET H5 - Nightly Reconciliation + Weekly Edge Report

Nightly 2 AM (ET): fetches yesterday+ broker fills from Alpaca, compares against trade_ledger order IDs, flags orphan fills (broker fill with no ledger row) and stale open rows (filled entry, no exit after 2 days). Audit row every run; Telegram alert only on mismatch.

Sunday 8 AM: posts edge_metrics_by_strategy scoreboard to Telegram - the ONLY input to sizing-parameter changes (ratchet rule).
